_comment: SINGLE COMMON recipient base for ALL wiki-sync routines (main + CAMI + every per-project repo). Read by routines/send_notification.py, resolved relative to THIS core repo — every routine invokes _core/routines/send_notification.py, so this one file governs all notifications. Per-project repos must NOT keep their own email_recipients.json. Edit + commit here; the next fire of any routine picks it up (no redeploy). Addresses must be syntactically valid; malformed ones are skipped with a logged warning. EMAIL_RECIPIENTS env var still overrides this file per-run.

_documentation.primary: Always-include recipients. Receives every routine run notification.
_documentation.additional: Opt-in subscribers. Same behavior as primary; the split is purely organisational so it's clear who the owner is vs who has subscribed.
